analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet criticizes the US as hypocritical and repressive toward Huawei, claiming the only reason is that Huawei is Chinese, and labels US actions as "dirty." Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Supported. The tweet portrays the US as hypocritical (boasting democracy/freedom yet repressing a foreign company) and acting unjustly/hostilely toward China, casting China/Huawei as a victim. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Not supported; no emphasis on China's cooperative or law-abiding international role beyond victimhood. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not relevant. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not addressed; no defense of China’s domestic political system or values. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds) — Not supported; no claim about CCP governance or China's achievements. CH6 (China is an interesting country in terms of culture, nature and heritage) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1 only.
